quotes_used.text:
Trust is eroded.
After years I unsubscribed to Spotify premium. Not being able to filter out AI generated music, learning about the abhorrent and blatant bottom line mission this company is on - just ew. No thanks.

Paid subscription
Why am I seeing three ads before a podcast, which has three more ads when paying for Spotify??????

it’s stuck
It’s on mix and I can’t undo it and I don’t wanna pay premium just to listen my music in latest added 😡

Ugh
The amount of commercials is insane and inconsistent. To the point I prefer to use YouTube which also has commercials but at least they’re more tolerable and understand how to properly shuffle through playlists.

Meh
The music is great, the transitions between songs is okay— but the constant ads are the problem. Like, I’d be listening to a row of two songs in my queue, and then I’m struck blind by a ROW of FIVE ads that are each 30 seconds to 1 minute long. I appreciate the opportunity of getting plus, or whatever it’s called, but the constant stream of ads is overdoing it…

The best features are going, going…
When your company exists to take money away from musicians and their fans, you’d think the best idea is to leave in the functional features they all love. Why are lyrics now unavailable on my phone, yet every. Single. Song. Has an AI blurb that nobody wanted or asked for? I will say, it’s nice they finally rolled out high definition audio. Now, if only they could roll out a higher share of royalties to artists, and ban all these AI bots…

Pay wall
The amount of paywalls this app has is sickening

Has been getting worse and worse
Since a few updates ago the app is nearly unusable. I’m on a fairly new iPhone 13 (all updated). App crashes throughout the day without warning, is extremely slow to load (10-15s between tapping on a song and it playing), downloads not working. Really considering switching after over 10 years with Spotify.

Terrible app
Money hungry app, that constantly increases our Price but doesn’t give us more listening hours on Audiobooks or Ad free Podcasts. You can have more hours by waiting you have BUY THEM!

  1 star. 4 thumbs Down.

Pages won’t load
I pay a subscription to use your service but after the last update, it still hasn’t fixed an issue Spotify has had for months. When you click on a podcast page, it doesn’t load the shows. All you get is the 3 dots flashing. It never loads. I’m now cancelling my subscription, had enough of the continuous faults that never get fixed. If I can’t use your app the way it’s meant to work and have to pay for the inconvenience, why bother. Waste of money.

Terrible Terrible App
Congratulations Spotify developers you have managed to destroy our listening experience with your updates for our iPads. 
We have 2 iPads in the house and I first thought it was just a deterioration in our older one but it is the same on our newer one too. 
I don’t know what you have done but app tries to load and fails it’s always loading or you try to search something and it fails and says to reload. 
Seriously poor show!
No issues with your app on our iPhones YET.

Bad Service
I hate this streaming app so much

Same service new price
Nothing has changed nothing has been improved and they just keep upping the subscription price. What a joke

So money hungry
How come we cant loop a song without premium?? And we cant pick the songs in the playlist without premium,and you also cant play them in order?!?!

Terrible soundcloud is 100% better
More ads than songs atleast with soundcloud you can avoid. Some songs on here aren’t available its terrible quite frankly

Waste app
0 rating only for money, each month paying 199 but no good waste of money no good song

Ad
Ad is much times

Audiobooks faulty
My audiobooks keeps repeating chapters. Has been happening for about a month. Can’t seem to be able to fix it. Glitch in the app!

greedy, greedy people
every time i make a playlist i can’t even listen to it because it adds all of its stupid songs. they should make the free one better smh. do not recommend. why are they so greedy? they do not need to put 4 ads in between each song it ruins the mood. and how come i can’t control what order i want to listen to the song? oh because you want more money. this company is so greedy that it won’t allow low-middle class to listen to music comfortably only people who are rich enough can. what is this inequality. i’m so disappointed, it’s 2026, be better.

Ads 🤬
Way too many idiot ads.

Waste of money
Everything, and I mean everything is premium. If I can’t listen to air conditioning beats, I would spend money on my own music app.

This app was what Karl Marx aimed to eradicate
This is one of the most horrid apps I’ve ever witnessed. I don’t know what sadist created this but the concept of you being treated like a serf if u don’t pay for premium disgusts me. It’s a music app and you’re just unable to listen to music on phone if ur a third class citizen. 6 skips per HOUR and u only get to CHOOSE what song YOU listen to 6 times. Religious people are stupid for believing there could possibly be a God when this is what’s happening in his supposed garden of Eden. And just like what Elon wants   I’m gonna keep the app bc I want my Spotify wrapped. Maybe if this country uses more child slave labour I’ll have wages high enough to both pay for Spotify premium and heat my house.

Boo
Pay to listen everything

Royalty Dispersion
I love the diverse genres of music and the natural algorithmic selections. I just wish the musicians received more financial return on each stream.

Over the last year Spotify has been really lagging with loading especially now that it has videos.

Laggy Startup
It is severely laggy at startup. It takes several minutes to load up after opening and is super slow.

Plz stop making everything about premium
I’ve never had this issue before, but for some reason I can’t replay songs because the song bar won’t move how much I tap on it, and the rewind button is greyed out and I can’t get rid of it no matter how hard I try. And apparently the internet has told me that’s a feature when you don’t have premium so it’s forcing me to pay for premium, but I don’t have enough money for premium! I really hope that you can fix this so that I can listen on your app daily like I used to, but for now I’m staying off it so that you guys can stop being some kind of greedy corporate

Horrible
They are gouging the prices again ,

Soon every real artist will be replace
Spotify,Seriously? Its full of ai artist don’t forget that everyone pay your bills are real human being. I am so disappointed

Forced to watch advertisements
I don’t understand that paying a subscription means being forced to watch advertisements

Always ads!
Have premium and I still get pop ups every time I open the app that I have to dismiss! I’m over it and wonder why I’m paying so much!
greedy company. removed my dj x feature on my student plan nou i need to pay 5 times the price just to get it back
This app is horrible! The fact that I am straight up forced to buy premium is wild! This deserves 1 star!

worst app, it's like i need Spotify premium to even play smth. I'm in a mobile and i can't loop songs unless i have premium, and as a student, I'm not permitted to buy any subscriptions. we know you need income, but genuinely stop. The amount of ads is just horrific, every two songs, it's a fricking ad. improve this Spotify, really.
i would have rated 5 stars but the reason is a few months ago only one ad used to come after half an hour but now ad comes of 1 to 1.5 minutes after a little bit of time 😞😞😞😞😞😞😞
Give us back the smaller widget. I do not want Spotify taking up a third of my home screen. also, there's no way to tell the app "I really don't like this band, stop playing their music"
do not play the same song which is searching

Had it for years
I’ve had Spotify for almost 10 years, I upgraded to premium bc I listen to music so much 🤣 and also got annoyed with the ads. But personally I love Spotify always have.

Fast speaking
When listening to podcasts soundtrack playback is faster than it should be. Tends only to be spoken programs that suffer as music is still at correct speed.

Recommended songs
The recommends songs are not based off my wants.  Too many ads and the price is too high… I do like the feature of adding songs in order for the que.

Good App Over Others But Data 2 Stars
Genuinely it’s a really good app but 2 stars because why am I paying a subscription for so much of my data to be collected on me. I guess the desensitization and new normal of surveillance. .-.
